title: Anatomy of a Python Loop Statement
description: A flowchart illustrating the control flow and logic of 'for' and 'while' loops in Python, highlighting their key components and execution path.
elements: Iterator Update (for: next item, while: variable change)
relationships: If Condition is True, leads to Body Execution
Body Execution leads to Iterator Update
Iterator Update leads back to Condition Check
If Condition is False, leads to Loop Exit
